attributes.morningActivities: Early entry to Louvre Museum (pre-booked 9 AM slot), focus on major highlights
attributes.afternoonActivities: Lunch at Café Marly, walk through Tuileries Gardens, visit Place Vendôme for shopping
attributes.eveningActivities: Sunset at Pont Alexandre III, aperitif cruise on Seine River, dinner in Marais district
attributes.notes:
# Full Day Paris Exploration

## Louvre Strategy
- Pre-purchased tickets: €17 each
- Focus on: Mona Lisa, Venus de Milo, Winged Victory
- Allow 3-4 hours maximum

## Dining Reservations
- Lunch: Café Marly (inside Louvre)
- Dinner: L'As du Fallafel (Marais) - no reservation needed

## Transportation
- Walking day - comfortable shoes essential
- Metro day pass for backup
